descriptions.404: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
descriptions.403: You don't have permission to access this resource.
descriptions.401: You need to be authenticated to access this resource.
descriptions.500: Our server encountered an error processing your request.
descriptions.503: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
descriptions.default: We encountered an unexpected error. Please try again.

deactivated.title: Account Deactivated
deactivated.description: Your account has been permanently deactivated and cannot be restored.
consequences: Your account and all associated data have been permanently deleted
All projects, containers, and configurations have been removed
This action cannot be undone or reversed
You will need to create a new account to use Kleff again
deactivated.error_message: If you believe this is an error, please contact support.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.description: An error occurred while rendering this component.
